title: TreasureChests
description: Create chests with custom loot and refill timers.
body:
# What is TreasureChests?
This plugin allows you to configure chests to auto-refill after a specific duration. The contents of the refill can be customized with drop chances.
Aside of having a single inventory per chest that refills. You can also setup a different inventory for each player.

# Features
- Unlimited chests
- Loot table
- Refill after minutes/hours/days...
- Highly optimised
- Custom chest names
- Player bound inventories
- Particles

# More information
Check out the [documentation](https://wiki.guflimc.com/s/treasurechests) for more information.
